reviews.review_title: Falsely banned by mod for “false report”
reviews.review_description: Every single server I go into I see the lava from the volcano. I can’t find 1 single server without lava, I told some people in the server “does the setting up the volcano count as harassment?” And they said “yes” and I say “who ever puts up the lava you have no skill”.   And a moderator joins an asked if some one reported someone else. And I see the kid who put up the lava the 2 time and I said “I’m reporting you” and I told them 3 times if they put up the lava it counts as harassment. And the moderator says “you can’t just report them because they are playing the game” and I said he already put the lava up 2 times in a row. And the moderator reports me I get triggered I told him that “the lava is harassing others” and the moderator reports me and I start to lose my mind . I start to argue with the moderator who sound like he’s 11 and I give him the finger. Vext please see this and talk to the owner abt this so the “11 yr old” can loose his moderation power for a week “thank you”

reviews.review_title: Sum good things about the game
reviews.review_description: Community is a bit bad but most moderators handle that situation in need of help from getting us on discord. This game is decently active aswell as a lot of ground and branch users. Sadly, some people do cheat in the game but remember, moderators quickly remove these problems in flick tag. Overall game is 5/5 and the thing that they need to fix importantly is the community

The community is ok 
There is comp teams that you can join
Overall the game is really good
